message:
fix: Add CI timeouts and relocate test groups

- Add timeout-minutes to all CI test jobs to prevent infinite hangs
- Move test groups from .claude/test_groups/ to tests/groups/ (tracked)
- Remove problematic tests from macos group (socket, ssl, subprocess, etc.)
- Fix child.kill() return type (returns Term, not void)
- Add PyValue handling for assertLess and max/min iterables

files.patch:
@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-core:
     name: CPython @core (286 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -37,10 +38,12 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Run platform-independent CPython tests
         run: ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython @core
+        timeout-minutes: 20
 
   test-cpython-linux:
     name: CPython @linux (18 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -57,10 +60,12 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Run Linux-specific CPython tests
         run: ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython @linux
+        timeout-minutes: 10
 
   test-cpython-macos:
-    name: CPython @macos (33 tests)
+    name: CPython @macos (25 tests)
     runs-on: macos-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -77,10 +82,12 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Run macOS-specific CPython tests
         run: ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython @macos
+        timeout-minutes: 10
 
   test-cpython-windows:
     name: CPython @windows (93 tests)
     runs-on: windows-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -97,3 +104,4 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Run Windows-specific CPython tests
         run: .\zig-out\bin\metal0.exe test tests/cpython @windows
+        timeout-minutes: 20
